ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Sweet pepper, green, yellow or red, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Tomatsaus 60 % (vann, tomatpure 13 %, hvetemel, rapsolje, sukker, salt, stabilisator (guarkjernemel, xantangummi), smaksforsterker (natriumglutamat), løk, krydder, paprika), spagetti 23 % (durumhvete, vann), capriboller 9 % (mekanisk utbeinet kyllingkjøtt, vann, stivelse, fett (storfe), salt, druesukker, hvetefiber, krydder), coctailpølser 8 % (mekanisk utbeinet kyllingkjøtt, vann, stivelse, salt, krydder). Kan inneholde spor av egg.
